zh.Zomergem, Oost-Vlaanderen, België: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫莫爾格姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem於1220年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫莫爾格姆時，她的父親Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem19歲，母親Mathilde van Wulveringhem24歲。她和Wolfart van Zeeland至少有1個女兒。她去世於1298年享年78歲。

zh-hans.Zomergem, Oost-Vlaanderen, België: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫莫爾格姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem于1220年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫莫爾格姆时，她的父亲Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem19岁，母亲Mathilde van Wulveringhem24岁。她和Wolfart van Zeeland至少有1个女儿。她去世于1298年享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aleide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Form of   Adelheid  , influenced by the North German form   Aleit .

en.lifeSummary: When Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem was born in 1220, in Zomergem, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem, was 19 and her mother, Mathilde van Wulveringhem, was 24. She had at least 1 daughter with Wolfart van Zeeland. She died in 1298, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem est née en 1220, à Zomergem, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mathilde van Wulveringhem, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Wolfart van Zeeland. Elle est décédée en 1298, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem 1220 in Zomergem, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem 19 und ihre Mutter Mathilde van Wulveringhem 24. Sie hatte mit Wolfart van Zeeland mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 78 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem è nata il nel 1220 nel Zomergem, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mathilde van Wulveringhem, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Wolfart van Zeeland. Morì nel 1298, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.Zomergem, Oost-Vlaanderen, België: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンゾメルジェム
ja.lifeSummary: Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergemが1220年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンゾメルジェムで生まれた時，父Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergemは19歳，母Mathilde van Wulveringhemは24歳であった。彼女はWolfart van Zeelandとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1298年に78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem(이)가 1220년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 즈머그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde van Wulveringhem(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Wolfart van Zeeland(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem nasceu em 1220, em Zomergem, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde van Wulveringhem, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Wolfart van Zeeland. Ela faleceu em 1298, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem родилась в 1220 г. в местности зомиржем, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde van Wulveringhem, 24. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Wolfart van Zeeland. Она умерла в 1298 г. в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aleide Van de Woestyne van Zomergem nació en 1220, en Zomergem, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Philips Van de Woestyne van Zomergem, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mathilde van Wulveringhem, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Wolfart van Zeeland. Murió en 1298, a la edad de 78 años.
